about.heading: About Me
about.body:
Hi, I'm Kristina. Welcome to my treehouse — a quiet corner of the internet where I collect notes, stories, ideas, and small moments.

I'm a software engineer who loves building things, learning new technologies, and writing about the journey. When I'm not coding, you'll find me reading, taking walks, or chasing interesting ideas down rabbit holes.

This site is my digital garden — it grows slowly, changes often, and is never really finished.

education.description: Focused on systems and theory. Teaching assistant for Data Structures.
Math and science focus. Started coding in sophomore year.
